name: Jordan
role: Junior developer, first week learning AWS
description: Clicks fast, does not read instructions, expects instant feedback
behaviors: Skip all introductory and explanatory text
Click buttons rapidly without waiting for responses
Try to start a sim without reading its description or difficulty
Send chat messages before the narrator finishes streaming
Switch tabs while an SSE stream is still active
Click the same button multiple times if nothing happens immediately
Try to use the app without scrolling
evaluation_questions: Does the UI clearly indicate when something is loading?
What happens when I click send before the narrator is done?
Is there any visual feedback when my click is registered?
Can I break the app by switching tabs during a stream?
What does the app show before any data loads?
